title: Chronicle of Poor Lovers
writer: Vasco Pratolini, Sergio Amidei, Giuseppe Dagnino
actors: Anna Maria Ferrero, Cosetta Greco, Antonella Lualdi
plot: In 1925 the young florentine typographer Mario moves to via del Corno to be near his girl-friend Bianca. Here he becomes friends with Maciste, his landlord, and Ugo, anti-fascists both of them. When Campolmi is beaten by the fasci...
